theme.description: A premium, personal, calm yet delightful digital memory vault. Uses deep near-black surfaces with vibrant pink, cyan, and purple accents for AI moments, status, and CTAs. Mobile-first prototype design.

app_shell.wrapper_classes: relative w-full min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#0B0C10] text-slate-50 font-sans overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-purple-500/30
app_shell.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#0B0C10] relative shadow-2xl overflow-y-auto pb-20 no-scrollbar

bottom_navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#0B0C10]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 max-w-md mx-auto pb-safe

items.name: Upload
items.classes: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 via-purple-500 to-cyan-500 text-white rounded-full w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center -mt-6 border-4 border-[#0B0C10] shadow-lg

cards.ai_highlight: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-pink-500/10 before:via-purple-500/10 before:to-cyan-500/10 before:opacity-50

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 active:scale-95 transition-transform hover:bg-white/15
buttons.ai_action: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 via-purple-500 to-cyan-500 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 active:scale-95 transition-transform

glassmorphism.header: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#0B0C10]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 pt-safe

sections: Primary AI Smart Action ('3 new memories ready to rediscover')
Today in Your Life Card (On This Day)

features: Minimal metadata (only essential icons like video duration)
Sticky filter chips (All, Favorites, Videos, Screenshots)

AI.layout: Tabbed interface with example prompt chips and conversational UI cards.

data_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

media.instructions: Main agent MUST use these precise URLs for mock data placeholders. Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy services like via.placeholder.com.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile UI prototype strictly for the web using max-w-md and mx-auto container sizes.
Apply DEMO DATA labels discreetly but visibly to indicate the mock status.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide Icons for clean, consistent mobile iconography.
Implement bottom-sheet style overlays for detail views instead of full page navigations to simulate mobile gestures.
No horizontal scroll overflow on the body (overflow-x-hidden).
Ensure all tap targets (buttons, links, icons) are at least 44x44 pixels for mobile accessibility.
Use standard React / Tailwind CSS in .js files as constrained by the environment.
